name: robotics-studio-open
description: Local-first robot episode metadata review IDE with deterministic checksummed evidence exports.

scripts.prebuild: pnpm run fixture:verify && pnpm run platform:build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm run fixture:verify && pnpm run platform:build
scripts.pretest: pnpm run fixture:verify && pnpm run platform:build
scripts.test: tsx tests/studio-smoke.test.ts && tsx tests/platform-inheritance.test.ts && tsx tests/accessibility-smoke.test.ts && tsx tests/local-operations.test.ts && tsx tests/proofline-ui.test.ts
scripts.precapture:evidence: pnpm run fixture:verify && pnpm run platform:build
scripts.pretest:capture-evidence: pnpm run fixture:verify && pnpm run platform:build
scripts.test:browser: pnpm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.smoke: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.platform:build: pnpm --dir packages/proofline-oss build && pnpm --dir packages/platform-contracts build && pnpm --dir packages/aura-ide-kit build
